items.title: South Korea arrests suspects behind Solana memecoin CatFi in first rugpull case under new law
items.whyYouShouldCare: The arrest of suspects in the CatFi rugpull highlights regulatory scrutiny, which could impact investor confidence and overall market integrity for Solana projects.

items.title: Solana privacy layer Umbra launches confidential vesting with Streamflow targeting $97B token unlock market
items.whyYouShouldCare: Umbra's launch of confidential vesting positions Solana to capture a significant share of the $97B token unlock market, enhancing its ecosystem's utility and appeal.

items.title: Solana – How SOL’s ETF boom pushed Jupiter Lend TVL above $2B
items.whyYouShouldCare: The rise of SOL ETFs has driven Jupiter Lend's TVL past $2B, indicating growing liquidity and interest in Solana's lending platforms.
